name: The Bags
description: The Bags is a next-generation Solana-based token studio designed to simplify token creation, trading, and management. Features include one-click token creation, IPFS/Arweave metadata storage, built-in bonding curves, real-time analytics, and AI-driven autonomous agents. Supporting all major Solana wallets including Phantom, Solflare, and WalletConnect-compatible wallets.
